svg.title: Cordial KDS system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture showing WhatsApp customer flow through Meta Cloud API, DigitalOcean server with Nginx, Express, SQLite, Vue dashboard, and Raspberry Pi thermal printer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does WhatsApp catalog ordering work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Meta Cloud API do in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does Nginx do in this deployment?')
sendPrompt('What does the Express API handle?')
sendPrompt('What does the order service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the WhatsApp service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the ticket service do?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the SQLite database?')
sendPrompt('Why use a JSON flat file for orders?')
sendPrompt('How does the Vue KDS dashboard work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Raspberry Pi printer worker work?')
sendPrompt('How does ESC/POS thermal printing work?')
